name: openmasjidos
description: OpenMasjidOS — a free, self-hosted, masjid-themed operating layer for running Docker apps. The core platform (Node + tRPC daemon and React dashboard).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @openmasjid/ui && npm run build -w @openmasjid/core
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @openmasjid/core && npm run lint -w @openmasjid/ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w @openmasjid/core --if-present && npm run test -w @openmasjid/ui --if-present
